title: Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Delhi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services:
Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services!
